prompts.text:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: production 2D NPC true-eight-direction sheet safe-cell correction
Input image: Image 1 is the exact 2x4 world sheet to correct.
Primary request: Re-create the same exact invisible 2-row by 4-column sheet, but uniformly reduce each of the eight full-body characters to about 72% of its current size and center each one INSIDE ITS OWN EQUAL CELL so every cell has a wide untouched magenta background margin on all four cell edges. The horizontal midpoint between rows must be a completely empty continuous magenta band at least 44 pixels tall: all top-row boots must end well ABOVE the sheet midpoint, and all bottom-row hair must start well BELOW the midpoint. Likewise keep an empty magenta band at least 32 pixels wide centered on every vertical quarter-cell seam. Nothing may cross or touch any cell boundary.
Preserve exactly: the same approachable approximately 29-year-old sturdy adult woman; same face, low thick braid, costume, warm-ochre/cream/blue-green/brick-red/dark-brown palette; blue-green shawl over HER OWN LEFT SHOULDER; closed gourd flask at HER OWN RIGHT HIP; same eight independently authored poses, direction semantics, prop sides, drawing style, body proportions and neutral expression. Do not mirror, flip, rotate, duplicate, relabel, swap, redesign or alter direction.
Required unchanged row-major directions: top SOUTH, SOUTHWEST facing canvas left, WEST pure left profile, NORTHWEST back-left; bottom NORTH complete back with no face, NORTHEAST back-right, EAST pure right profile, SOUTHEAST facing canvas right.
Composition: exact square canvas and exact invisible equal 2x4 grid, identical adult scale and baseline inside each row, generous padding on sheet outer edges and every cell seam, all body/hair/flask inside cells. No visible dividers.
Background: perfectly uniform fully opaque flat solid #FF00FF across all empty space, no gradient, texture, shadow, floor, scenery or lighting change; no magenta or purple on subject.
Avoid: changing any facing or swapping shawl/flask sides; text, labels, arrows, borders, dividers, UI, watermark, cast/contact shadow, detached objects, extra person; professional service props or uniforms, coins, bank props, open merchandise, price tags, keys, medicine, training gear, weapon, shield, animal, copied StoneAge art.
negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must show no face and adjacent diagonals must expose opposite back shoulders
the blue-green shawl remains on the subject's own left shoulder and the closed gourd flask remains on her own right hip
no text, labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark, shadow or scenery
no professional service uniforms or props, coins, open merchandise, keys, medicine, training gear, weapon or shield
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying
prompts.model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board.png is the accepted v2 built-in image_gen identity canary; v1 was rejected because its front view put the flask on the wrong body side

styleReference.usage: rendering quality, adult scale and three-view layout reference only; no person, face, costume, prop, palette or occupation pixels were copied or composited

prompts.text:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: production dialogue portrait expression source sheet for Beastbound Odyssey NPC
Input image: Image 1 is the exact identity reference. Preserve this woman, not merely a similar relative.
Primary request: Create an EXACT SQUARE CANVAS with an invisible 2-row by 2-column portrait sheet of the SAME approachable approximately 29-year-old sturdy adult ordinary village civilian. Chest-up / waist-up dialogue bust, front three-quarter orientation facing slightly toward screen-right, same camera, crop, head size, shoulder width, body scale, outfit and lighting in all four cells. Her muted blue-green woven shawl stays over HER OWN LEFT SHOULDER; the closed gourd flask remains below the portrait crop and need not be shown. Preserve her warm-tan soft square-oval face, kind dark eyes, deep-brown softly wavy low thick braid, warm ochre outer tunic, cream inner shirt and brick-red lower accent. No redesign, profession drift, age drift or hero treatment.
EXACT EXPRESSION ORDER:
Top-left NEUTRAL: attentive relaxed face, mouth closed.
Top-right SPEAKING: natural mid-sentence mouth slightly open, engaged brows, not shouting.
Bottom-left SMILE: warm unforced neighborly smile, mouth gently closed or slightly open.
Bottom-right CONCERNED: mild thoughtful concern, brows slightly inward, mouth closed; not angry, not crying.
Composition: square canvas, exact invisible equal 2x2 grid with no borders/dividers. One bust centered in each cell, same eye line and shoulder width, central safe area, generous top and outer-side padding. Nothing crosses between cells. Keep same head angle and shoulders; change only facial expression and tiny natural eyebrow/mouth movement. Hair and clothing remain inside each cell.
Style: original legally distinct Beastbound Odyssey clean high-definition hand-painted 2D dialogue illustration, crisp warm dark outlines, controlled soft cel shading, low texture noise, expressive readable face; same exact art language as input, not pixel art, not 3D, not photorealistic.
Background: perfectly uniform fully opaque flat solid #FF00FF across the entire square sheet, no gradient, texture, shadow, floor, scenery or lighting variation; never use magenta or purple on subject.
Constraints: same exact person and costume four times; five fingers where visible; no cast/contact shadow.
Avoid: readable text, letters, numbers, labels, arrows, UI, border, frame line, watermark, speech bubble, detached object, extra person; coins, coin purse, abacus, ledger, registration board, bank uniform/counter, open market basket, price tag, merchandise, manor keys, medical satchel, training gear, weapon, shield, animal, copied StoneAge art.
negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must show no face and adjacent diagonals must expose opposite back shoulders
the blue-green shawl remains on the subject's own left shoulder and the closed gourd flask remains on her own right hip
no text, labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark, shadow or scenery
no professional service uniforms or props, coins, open merchandise, keys, medicine, training gear, weapon or shield
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying
prompts.model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board.png is the accepted v2 built-in image_gen identity canary; v1 was rejected because its front view put the flask on the wrong body side
